'30 lakh fake accounts': West Bengal govt orders SIT probe into Lakshmir Bhandar scheme
description: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced a special investigation team and money laundering probe into alleged fake Lakshmir Bhandar accounts. He revealed approximately 30 lakh accounts were fraudulent, with men also receiving benefits under the previous TMC government.  The Chief Minister emphasized this action to prevent illegalities in future welfare schemes.

Google plans to release 32 million Wolbachia-infected mosquitoes across Florida and California
description: Alphabet's Debug initiative is seeking EPA approval to release 32 million specially treated male mosquitoes in California and Florida. This innovative approach uses Wolbachia bacteria to sterilize wild Culex mosquitoes, aiming to significantly reduce the spread of diseases like West Nile virus. Advanced AI and robotics are enabling this large-scale effort, with trials planned over two years.

Google AI CEO has a message for laid off engineers at Meta, Amazon, Block, and other companies
description: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis argues companies cutting engineers due to AI are misguided. He believes increased productivity should fuel more projects, not layoffs. Hassabis sees AI as an opportunity to expand ambitions, not shrink workforces, and is eager to hire talent shed by rivals for new ventures like drug discovery and game design.

title: UP woman dies after quack performs C-section at sealed hospital
description: A 30-year-old ASHA worker died in Sonbhadra after a quack allegedly performed a C-section at a hospital that had been sealed multiple times. The accused and associates fled after the botched surgery, leaving the woman's abdomen unsutured. The newborn survived. Authorities have launched a manhunt for the hospital operators, Naseem and Salma, who are now facing serious charges.

title: Declan Rice’s girlfriend: All about Lauren Fryer before 2026 World Cup
description: Arsenal star midfielder Declan Rice has been with his girlfriend, Lauren Fryer, for over a decade now even as the two have continued to get trolled for their relationship in public for the last few years. While Lauren Fryer has remained pretty private about her life, Declan Rice has often defended her in public as he spoke about how she has changed his life for the better.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: MiraOne founder explains why one-size-fits-all healthcare is fading
description: MiraOne offers a comprehensive blood test combining genetic insights and medicine-response analysis for personalized wellness. Founded by Nickhil Jakatdar and Abhinav Kejriwal, it translates complex data into actionable recommendations, addressing the healthcare challenge of truly personalized medicine. This innovative approach empowers individuals to make informed health decisions and enhances the doctor-patient relationship
